title: mandevilla tristis
intro: Mandevilla tristis, also known as the White Mandevilla or Rocktrumpet, is a tropical evergreen vine native to Central and South America, characterized by its showy, funnel-shaped flowers that bloom in shades of white and pink. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Mandevilla tristis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of Mandevilla tristis can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
